---
title: "Work with us"
description: "Tell us what you are dealing with: data capture, statistics, or clinical evidence for your product."
---

## Tell us what you are stuck on

If it is clinical data, statistics, or evidence for your product, it has almost
certainly come up before. The fastest way to start is a short message
describing what you are building and where you are stuck.

::: {.grid-3 style="margin: 2rem 0;"}
::: {.card-lite}
[✉️]{.card-icon}

### Email us

A few lines about your product, your data, or your question is enough to get
going.

[bisturiep005@gmail.com](mailto:bisturiep005@gmail.com){.btn-primary-cta}
:::

::: {.card-lite}
[▶️]{.card-icon}

### See the work

Practical guides and worked examples that show the approach before any call.

[YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@High_005)
:::

::: {.card-lite}
[🔗]{.card-icon}

### Check the track record

Publicly verifiable work and collaborations.

[ORCID profile](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4610-0950)
:::
:::

## Who it's for

- Health-tech and digital-health startups
- Medtech and life-science companies
- Hospitals and clinical teams
- Research groups

Recent and ongoing engagements include Diecimilauno S.p.A. (Treviso),
telemedicine and energy startups in Milan and Padua, a deeptech startup in
Verona, clinical departments at the University of Padua, ASST Ospedale Papa
Giovanni XXIII in Bergamo, and Mainz University.
